sglang.title: Fix bias handling in TritonMoeQuantInfo within quantization/mxfp4.py
sglang.author: yhyang201
sglang.bodyExcerpt:
Motivation
This PR fixes a field mismatch when constructing TritonMoeQuantInfo in quantization/mxfp4.py.

Issue: The call site passed w13_weight_bias and w2_weight_bias, but TritonMoeQuantInfo defines these as optional fields b13 and b2. This could raise a TypeError and/or leave biases unwired.
Fix:

sglang.title: feat: Add FlexAttention Backend for Efficient Sparse Attention
sglang.author: yukiy927
sglang.bodyExcerpt:
Motivation

This PR introduces a new attention backend leveraging PyTorch's flex_attention API. While existing backends like FlashAttention are highly optimized for dense attention, they offer limited flexibility for custom sparse patterns.
The FlexAttention backend addresses this gap by enabling ef

sglang.title: Garbage collector regression in the online server
sglang.author: brayden-hai
sglang.bodyExcerpt: We encountered a regression in the online server, where freezing Python’s GC during graph capture reduced serving throughput at larger batch sizes (we saw no measurable difference at the concurrency=1 case). Freezing GC shows a measurable drop (~3%). We found that calling gc.collect() after unfreeze

The recent issue (#24029) shows users' confusion about parallel sampling in LLMEngine and AsyncLLM. The gist of the confusion is that users expect features to behave as in the class LLM, but the difference is LLM uses FINAL_ONLY by default, whereas LLMEngine or AsyncLLM uses CUMULATIVE by de

vllm.title: [KV offload][1/N] Introduce an offloading component
vllm.author: orozery
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
This PR adds a new offloading component, composed of:

A scheduler side OffloadingManager (abstract) which kicks-off KV data transfers and keeps track of offloaded data.
A worker side OffloadingQueueManager which asynchronously manages KV transfers.

Part of the work described in RFC #19854

The root cause of this issue is from (runtime_shape, graph_index, backend_name) is not a strong enough cache key for compiled cuda graph. And in complicated situation like DeepEP HT, we split the piecewise graph moe_forward and moe_forward_shared and make the wrong cache hit.
I

vllm.title: [OOT] Support sync_model_loading for OOT
vllm.author: xuechendi
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
Purpose
Add use_sync_weight_loader and make_synced_weight_loader in current_platform so OOT plugin can also apply do synced_model_loading if needed.
